productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men 22Yds Trainer2 White Sports Shoes
description: 22Yds Trainers are perfect for cricket lovers who need a shoe to support their game performance. adidas have packed this shoe full of features to ensure you'll be playing at your best. Upper Synthetic leather upper for comfort and durability Perforated for ventilation TPU moulded stripes for support & style Lace-up for snug Fit Brand name embossed on the tongue Patented adidas 3-stripes for style Meshed and padded tongue Midsole Injection EVA midsole for lightweight cushioning Torsion system at midfoot Outsole Aggressive rubber outsole SPEED GRIP for maximum traction & agility Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
